name: ABM Pizza Dough
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz. water (1 1/4 cup + 1 tbsp.), 80 degrees F
2 1/2 teaspoons active dry yeast or 2 tsp. bread machine yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Use dough setting on the bread machine.
2. Add liquid ingredients to the pan: water and vegetable oil.
3. Add dry ingredients, except yeast, to the pan: flour, sugar, salt.
4. Tap the pan to settle the dry ingredients, then level them by pushing some mixture into the corners.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients; add yeast.
6. Lock the pan into the bread machine.
7. Program for dough setting if applicable. Set a time delay if using.
8. Start the bread maker.
9. When done, unlock the pan from the bread machine.
10. Place the dough onto a floured surface.
11. Knead the dough for about 1 minute.
12. Let it rest for 15 minutes.
13. Roll the dough to fit a 12 or 14 inch pizza pan (or baking sheet).
14. Place the dough into a greased pan sprinkled with cornmeal.
15. Press the dough into the pan, forming an edge.
16. Let the dough rise in a warm, draft-free place for 20 to 25 minutes.
17. Spread pizza sauce evenly over the crust.
18. Top with favorite toppings and shredded cheese.
19. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes or until nicely browned on top.
20. Let rest 5 minutes before cutting.
